title: Mandatory Chapel Attendance
content: Participation in all chapel services and religious events is compulsory for all students.

title: Dress Code Compliance
content: Students are expected to dress modestly and professionally. Jeans, leggings, and other forms of indecent dressing are generally prohibited on campus.

title: Identification Cards
content: Students must wear their student ID cards at all times to gain access to academic buildings and campus facilities.

title: Device Restrictions
content: Tablets and laptops are permitted for academic use, but specific restrictions apply. For example, SIM cards may need to be removed from tablets.

title: Prohibition of Hard Drugs and Contraband
content: Possession, use, or distribution of illicit drugs and other banned substances is strictly prohibited.

title: Curfew and Hostel Regulations
content: Students must adhere to designated hostel arrival and departure times. Unauthorized movement after hours is a punishable offense.

title: Class Attendance
content: Punctuality and regular attendance at lectures are required. Chronic absenteeism can lead to academic sanctions.

title: Respect for Authority
content: Students are expected to show courtesy and deference to faculty, staff, and campus security. Disagreement is allowed, but disrespect is not.

title: Prohibition of Worldly Music
content: Playing loud or offensive music and secular media deemed contrary to the university mission is restricted.

title: Entrepreneurial Studies (EDS)
content: Participation in the university entrepreneurship development program is a mandatory graduation requirement for all students.

title: Total Man Concept (TMC)
content: All students must participate in Total Man Concept courses, which focus on holistic development of spirit, mind, and body.

title: Academic Integrity
content: Plagiarism, fabrication of data, and any form of deceit in academic work are considered serious violations.

title: Campus Environment and Maintenance
content: Students are responsible for maintaining campus cleanliness and protecting university property as an act of stewardship.

title: Communication and Behavior
content: Student conduct, including online behavior and social media usage, should reflect the core values of the institution at all times.

title: Sexual Purity
content: The university upholds strict standards regarding sexual conduct and relationships. Behaviors outside these standards are subject to disciplinary action.

title: Prohibited Meetings
content: Unauthorized or clandestine student meetings and gatherings that are not sanctioned by university authorities are prohibited.

title: Use of University Facilities
content: Misuse of library resources, laboratories, or communal facilities can lead to heavy fines and disciplinary hearings.

title: Compliance with Security Personnel
content: Students must cooperate with the university internal security team and follow all safety protocols.

title: Adherence to Policies
content: Students are expected to be familiar with the Student Handbook and follow all amendments issued by the administration during their course of study.

title: Zero-Tolerance for Examination Malpractice
content: Covenant University treats examination malpractice as a capital offense. Engaging in any form of cheating during exams or continuous assessments leads to automatic dismissal from the institution.

name: Chapel of Light
description: The main chapel at Covenant University. Mandatory chapel service holds every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday at 6:45 AM.
openingHours: Mon, Wed, Fri – 6:45 AM | Sunday – 8:00 AM

localizedDescriptions.yo: Sooṣi akọkọ ni Covenant University. Iṣẹ ṣooṣi dandan waye ni Monday, Wednesday ati Friday ni 6:45 AM.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a bu chapel isi nke Covenant University. Orufe dandan na-eme Monday, Wednesday na Friday n'oge 6:45 AM.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na the main chapel for Covenant University. Mandatory chapel dey hold every Monday, Wednesday and Friday by 6:45 AM.

name: Engineering & Science Building (ENG)
description: Houses the College of Engineering and the College of Science and Technology. Contains lecture halls, labs, and staff offices.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Ile yii ni College of Engineering ati College of Science and Technology wa. O ni lecture halls, lab ati ofisi awon osise.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ulo a nwere College of Engineering na College of Science and Technology. O nwere lecture hall, lab na ofisi ndi nkuzi.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: This building hold College of Engineering and College of Science and Technology, with lecture halls, labs and staff offices.

name: University Library
description: The main library with extensive print and digital resources. Wi-Fi available. Student ID required for entry.
openingHours: Mon–Fri: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Sat: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM

localizedDescriptions.yo: Ile-ikawe pataki pẹlu iwe titẹ ati ohun elo digital lọpọlọpọ. Wi-Fi wa, ID akekoo ni a nilo fun iwọle.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ulo akwukwo isi nwere akwukwo ebi na dijitalu n'uba. Wi-Fi di, a choro ID umu akwukwo tupu nbata.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na main library with plenty print and digital resources. Wi-Fi dey available and you must show student ID enter.

name: Male Hostel (David's Court)
description: Main male student accommodation complex. Contains rooms, common areas, and laundry facilities.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Ibugbe pataki fun awon akekoo okunrin, pẹlu yara, aaye apapọ ati ohun elo laundry.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ulo obibi isi maka umu akwukwo nwoke, nwere ime ulo, ebe ndi mmadu na-anọkọ na ebe asa uwe.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na main male hostel complex with rooms, common areas and laundry facilities.

name: Female Hostel (Esther Hall)
description: Main female student accommodation complex. Secure access with 24-hour security personnel.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Ibugbe pataki fun awon akekoo obinrin, pẹlu aabo to muna wakati 24.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ulo obibi isi maka umu akwukwo nwanyi, nwere nche siri ike awa 24.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na main female hostel complex with secure access and 24-hour security.

name: University Cafeteria
description: The main dining hall serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Accepts CU ID cards for cashless payments.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Gbongan ounje pataki to n pese aro, osan ati ale. O gba kaadi ID CU fun isanwo cashless.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ebe iri nri isi na-enye nri ututu, ehihie na mgbede. O na-anabata kaadị ID CU maka ugwo cashless.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na main cafeteria wey dey serve breakfast, lunch and dinner. You fit pay with CU ID card.

name: Student Health Centre
description: Provides medical consultation, emergency care, and pharmacy services for students and staff.

localizedDescriptions.yo: N pese ijumọsọrọ iṣoogun, itoju pajawiri ati iṣẹ ile elegbogi fun akekoo ati osise.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Na-enye nlele dọkịta, nlekọta mberede na ọrụ pharmacy maka umu akwukwo na ndi oru.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Dem dey provide medical consultation, emergency care and pharmacy services for students and staff.

name: Sports Complex
description: Multi-purpose sports facility with football field, basketball courts, tennis courts, and gym.
openingHours: Mon–Fri: 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM | Weekends: 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM

localizedDescriptions.yo: Aye idaraya to ni papa boolu, kootu basketball, kootu tennis ati gym.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ebe egwuregwu nwere football field, basketball court, tennis court na gym.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na sports complex with football field, basketball courts, tennis courts and gym.

name: Administrative Block
description: Central administrative hub. Houses the Vice-Chancellor's office, Registry, Bursary, and other admin units.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Aarin isakoso yunifasiti; ofisi Vice-Chancellor, Registry, Bursary ati awon eka isakoso miiran wa nibi.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ebe etiti nlekota mahadum; ofisi Vice-Chancellor, Registry, Bursary na ngalaba nlekota ndi ozo di ebe a.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na central admin hub. Vice-Chancellor office, Registry, Bursary and other admin units dey here.

name: Peter Odili Academic City (POAC)
description: State-of-the-art lecture complex housing large lecture halls, seminar rooms, and ICT centers.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Complex ikeko to ga julọ pẹlu gbongan ikeko nla, yara seminar ati aarin ICT.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ogige nkuzi ogo di elu nke nwere nnukwu lecture hall, seminar room na ICT centers.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na modern lecture complex with large lecture halls, seminar rooms and ICT centers.

name: Senate Building
description: Houses the Senate Chamber, Council room, and key administrative offices for the university governance.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Nibi ni Senate Chamber, Council room ati awon ofisi isakoso pataki fun iṣakoso yunifasiti wa.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Nke a nwere Senate Chamber, Council room na ofisi nlekota di mkpa maka iduzi mahadum.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: This building house Senate Chamber, Council room and key administrative offices for university governance.

name: Student Centre
description: Central hub for student activities, clubs, and organizations. Contains meeting rooms and recreation areas.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Aarin fun awon iṣẹ akekoo, club ati organization. O ni yara ipade ati agbegbe ere/isinmi.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Ebe etiti maka mmemme umu akwukwo, klọb na otu di iche iche. O nwere meeting room na ebe ntụrụndụ.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na central hub for student activities, clubs and organizations with meeting rooms and recreation areas.

name: School of Law
description: Dedicated faculty for law students with moot courts, law clinics, and legal research centers.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Faculty pataki fun awon akekoo ofin, pẹlu moot court, law clinic ati aarin iwadi ofin.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Faculty raara nye umu akwukwo iwu, nwere moot court, law clinic na ebe nyocha iwu.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na dedicated law faculty with moot courts, law clinics and legal research centers.

name: Business School
description: Faculty of Business Administration and Management Sciences. Houses the Bloomberg terminal lab.

localizedDescriptions.yo: Faculty ti Business Administration ati Management Sciences, pẹlu Bloomberg terminal lab.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Faculty nke Business Administration na Management Sciences, tinyere Bloomberg terminal lab.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Faculty of Business Administration and Management Sciences. E get Bloomberg terminal lab there.

name: CU Staff Quarters Gate
description: Main entrance gate to staff residential quarters. Access restricted to authorized personnel.

localizedNames.ig: Onu Uzo Ulo Obibi Ndi Oru CU

localizedDescriptions.yo: Enu-bode akọkọ si ibugbe awon osise, ati pe iwọle wa fun awon eniyan to ni aṣẹ nikan.
localizedDescriptions.ig: Onu uzo isi gara ulo obibi ndi oru, a na-ekwe ka ndi nwere ikike nani bata.
localizedDescriptions.pidgin: Na main gate to staff quarters. Access na only for authorized personnel.
